definitions.vi: y chang có nghĩa là giống hệt; như.

example.es: Ella es igual que su madre.
example.en: She is just like her mother.
example.vi: Cô ấy y chang như mẹ của mình.

notes:
y chang means exactly the same or identical. It’s informal and used a lot in everyday speech.

It works like an adjective and describes two things that are 100% alike. You can put it after a noun phrase or use it as the main description in a sentence.

In the North, people often say y hệt instead — same meaning, just a regional preference. Opposite idea: khác hẳn (completely different).
exampleSentencesTranslated: This picture is exactly the same as the one you drew yesterday.
The dish you cooked today is exactly the same as the one mom used to make when we were kids.
Your answer is exactly the same as mine.
exampleSentences: Anh thấy bức tranh này y chang bức tranh hôm qua em vẽ.
Món ăn chị nấu hôm nay y chang món mẹ làm lúc nhỏ.
Câu trả lời của em y chang câu trả lời của anh luôn đó.

content.sentence: Câu trả lời của bạn ___ như của tôi.

translation.en: Your answer is exactly like mine.
She said that is exactly right.

content.sentence: Cô ấy nói điều đó ___ đúng.

notes_md:
**y chang** means *exactly the same* or *identical*. It’s informal and used a lot in everyday speech.

It works like an adjective and describes two things that are 100% alike. You can put it after a noun phrase or use it as the main description in a sentence.


In the North, people often say **y hệt** instead — same meaning, just a regional preference. Opposite idea: **khác hẳn** (completely different).
